Identity.Name: StingSuitabilityCodes
Identity.Definition: ISO 19650-2 information-container suitability codes — the standard letter-and-number codes that classify whether a document / model is at WIP / Shared / Published. S0 (initial), S1 (suitable for coordination), S2 (suitable for information), S3 (suitable for review and comment), S4 (suitable for stage approval), then published codes A1..A5 for authorised use and AR for archived. Applied to drawings, sheets, transmittals, deliverables.

Governance.StandardsBasis: ISO 19650-2:2018 Annex B / UK Annex; BS EN ISO 19650-1:2018 Table 5. NOTE: codes S5..S7 (PIM / AIM authorisation, AIM update) are NOT in ISO 19650-2 — projects that use those codes must add them via project-overlay enum, not via the corporate baseline.

Value.Definition: Initial status — issued for sharing within originator's team. Pre-coordination WIP.
Suitable for Coordination — shared across disciplines for design coordination.
Suitable for Information — shared with the wider team for information only.
Suitable for Review and Comment — issued for formal review by the lead appointed party.
Suitable for Stage Approval — formal client / appointing-party approval gate.
Authorised — for installation / construction on site.
Archived — superseded but retained for audit. Read-only.
Unknown / not yet assigned. IDS fails at any published state.
